# The Historic Gross House — Commercial Real Estate Listing

> Canonical marketing site: https://historic-gross-house.piljay.com
> For-sale commercial conversion opportunity in Kingsland, Georgia.

## Summary

- Property: The Historic Gross House (est. 1912)
- Address: 290 East King Avenue, Kingsland, GA 31548
- Asking price: $574,900 USD
- Building size: approximately 3,955 square feet
- Lot: 0.55-acre corner lot with on-site parking
- Use case: Professional or medical office conversion; adaptive reuse of a historic residence
- Listing agent: Bob Piljay, Associate Broker (Florida and Georgia), Watson Realty Corp.
- Agent phone: (912) 322-1377
- Agent email: bob@piljay.com
- Brokerage phone: (912) 882-5658
